🤖 THE BOT REPORT

Today's "sharp money" before we cleaned it:
• 348 wallets scanned
• 370 market makers stripped
• 12 arb bots removed
→ 382 fake "sharps" filtered out

When someone says "sharps are on X," ask: which ones? Most of it is bots.

🗺️ SMART MONEY MAP — 2026-06-19

272 tracked wallets today:

1. Australia @ United States: $929,892 (11 wallets, United States)
2. Morocco @ Scotland: $169,420 (9 wallets, Morocco)
3. Saudi Arabia @ Spain: $55,140 (6 wallets, Spain)

Concentration = conviction.

🔍 SHARP SPOTLIGHT: cd2f63

A wallet we've tracked all season.
• Polymarket SOC P&L: $290,066
• ROI: 4.7% over $6M traded
• Leaderboard rank: #10 of thousands
• Avg bet: $14,830

Today they're in on 15 games. This is who we watch so you don't have to.

🔬 LINE MOVE AUTOPSY — San Diego Padres @ Texas Rangers

Over moved 50¢ → 80¢ (+30 pts) today.

Who did it:
• $1,049 BUY from heyi8
• $529 BUY from swisstony

Not a guess. The actual tape. This is what a real move looks like.
